content: SearchType enum: from cognee import SearchType (also: from cognee.api.v1.search import SearchType). Key values: GRAPH_COMPLETION (default, full graph context + LLM answer), CHUNKS (raw semantic segments), CHUNKS_LEXICAL (BM25 keyword), RAG_COMPLETION (classic RAG), HYBRID_COMPLETION, TRIPLET_COMPLETION, GRAPH_COMPLETION_DECOMPOSITION, GRAPH_SUMMARY_COMPLETION, CYPHER, NATURAL_LANGUAGE, GRAPH_COMPLETION_COT, GRAPH_COMPLETION_CONTEXT_EXTENSION, TEMPORAL, CODING_RULES, AGENTIC_COMPLETION, FEELING_LUCKY (auto-select). Usage: results = await cognee.search('query', query_type=SearchType.GRAPH_COMPLETION). Can scope to datasets: datasets=['my_dataset'].
